title: Type-safe Full-Stack Next.js with tRPC + Drizzle ORM
description: Build an end-to-end type-safe Next.js application: Drizzle ORM for the database, tRPC for the API layer, Zod for shared validation, and Zustand for client state. No code generation, no runtime type mismatches.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Set up Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL for type-safe database access
Define shared Zod schemas for input validation and type inference
Set up tRPC for end-to-end type-safe API procedures
Add Zustand for lightweight client-side state management
Set up Vitest for unit and integration testing
Configure CI/CD pipeline with type-checking and tests
Deploy to Vercel with environment variables
